text: The universe began in a hot dense state and expanded over time.
In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
Life contains suffering and liberation comes through understanding and practice.
Human beings are condemned to be free and must create meaning.
The end is near and only total obedience will save the chosen group.
Claims must be tested, observed and challenged through evidence.
A hidden elite controls the world and only a few can see the truth.
Allah is the creator of the heavens and the earth.
Life has no inherent meaning or objective value.
The enemy is responsible for every problem and unity requires total loyalty.
